raw_content_preview: {"findings":[{"rule_id":"R001","issue":"Authentication details are incomplete: method, roles/scopes/ownership requirements, and authentication failure behavior are not specified.","severity":"high","evidence":"Notes only state: \"The endpoint requires login.\""},{"rule_id":"R002","issue":"Request field requirements and constraints are not documented, including required vs optional fields, defaults, types beyond examples, length/range limits, and format validation.","severity":"medium","evidence"
